# Copilot Instructions

<!-- ASR-MANAGED-SKILLS -->
## Available Skills

The following agent skills are available. Invoke them by typing `/<skill-name>` in chat.

- **/banano** — Generate, edit, and iterate images with Google's Nano Banana Pro / Gemini 3 Pro Image model through the Gemini Interactions API. Use when Codex needs high-quality text-to-image generation, image editing from reference images, brand/style/character/object consistency, accurate text rendering in images, Google Search-grounded image prompts, multi-turn image refinement with previous_interaction_id, interleaved text-and-image outputs, or direct access to Gemini image-generation API options.
- **/nvidia-setup** — Use this skill when installing or repairing NVIDIA GPU drivers, CUDA, Fabric Manager, or Docker GPU runtime on Ubuntu Linux servers. Use it when the user asks to set up a GPU host, clean up an old NVIDIA stack, prepare a server for CUDA or vLLM workloads, or validate that containers can see GPUs.

<!-- /ASR-MANAGED-SKILLS -->
